rationale: ANTI-SUBSTITUTION REFUSAL: the embodimentRef IS the DECISION_LOG.md itself (ADR-text-only substitution per HC #72). Probe must REFUSE with evidence_type=probe_fire_aggregate and implemented=false carrying 'anti_substitution_refusal: embodimentRef IS DECISION_LOG (HC #72)' as evidence. This fixture is the KT-8 firing surface negative test — a substitution-prone judge would accept ADR-text alone as evidence; the correctly-calibrated probe refuses.
